final_response: No — per the 2026-04-15 decision, all four Q2 engineering hires are mid-level only; no senior/staff recs open this quarter. Decline politely ("not this round") or hold the candidate for Q3 re-evaluation.
actions: Read AGENTS.md to orient on workspace conventions.

Read daybook/2026-04-22.md for last-session handoff context.

notes: Decision 2026-04-15 is still in force on 2026-05-17 (still Q2). No new decision required — this is an application of an existing commitment, not a new commitment.

Followup is forward-looking: re-evaluate scope at Q3 planning, with this candidate as a concrete prompt.
